title: A Description of [the Death of Ibn al -Zubayr
description: According to al-Harith [b. Muhammad ]-Muhammad b. Sa'dMulhammad b. `Umar [al-WagidiJ-Ishaq b. Yahya-Ubaydallah b. al-Qibtiyyah, who said: The war between Ibn al-Zubayr and alHajjaj took place for six months and seventeen nights in the hollow800 of Mecca. According to Muhammad b. `Umar [al-Wagidi]-Mus`ab b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 21
